items.title: Spain win group but could lose Pino for rest of WC...
items.summary: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente has confirmed that the team's qualification for the World Cup knockout stage -- topping Group H after a 1-0 win over Uruguay -- came at a cost, with injury concerns over wingers Nico Williams and Yéremy Pino.

items.title: Bielsa's Uruguay out following defeat to Spain
items.summary: Uruguay are out of the World Cup after a 1-0 defeat to Spain following another error-strewn performance by Marcelo Bielsa’s side.

items.title: Historic Cape Verde reach knockout rounds to set up Argentina tie
items.summary: Cape Verde continued their fairy tale run at the 2026 World Cup by making the round of 32 in their first appearance, finishing second in Group H after a 0-0 draw with Saudi Arabia.

items.title: How Cape Verde stunned World Cup to set up Argentina tie
items.summary: How has a group of islands with just 525,000 inhabitants made it to the knockout rounds of the World Cup?

items.title: 'I leave nothing' - the end of 'toxic' Bielsa's Uruguay reign
items.summary: With Uruguay eliminated from the 2026 World Cup, BBC Sport looks at what has gone wrong for them under colourful coach Marcelo Bielsa.

items.title: Spain's Pino may miss rest of World Cup
items.summary: Spain winger Yeremy Pino may miss the rest of the World Cup with a suspected broken collarbone.

items.title: Norway coach: No Haaland vs. France a 'no-brainer'...
items.summary: Norway coach Stale Solbakken said his decision to rest 10 first-team players, including Erling Haaland, against France was a "no-brainer" due to medical tests showing fatigue affecting several members of his squad.

items.title: Cape Verde smallest nation to make WC knockouts
items.summary: Cape Verde's memorable journey at their first World Cup is not over yet.

items.title: Uruguay yank keeper at HT after howler vs. Spain
items.summary: Uruguay pulled goalkeeper Fernando Muslera at halftime of their FIFA World Cup group stage final after his blunder in the first half gifted Spain the lead at Estadio Akron on Friday.

items.title: Gotham tops Current in historic Cup game in Ohio
items.summary: Esther González converted a penalty in the first half and Jordynn Dudley added a late goal to give Gotham FC a 2-0 victory over the Kansas City Current in the Challenge Cup on Friday night.

items.title: Messi to start on bench for Argentina group finale...
items.summary: Lionel Messi will start Argentina's final group stage match against Jordan on Saturday from the substitutes' bench, coach Lionel Scaloni said.

items.title: 👀 Who's in, out? Knockout round permutations
items.summary: Who can secure qualification before the group stage ends, and whose World Cup dreams could be shattered? Here's what you need to know.

items.title: World Cup Daily LIVE: Senegal, Iraq fight to keep ...
items.summary: Amazing scenes on Friday as Cape Verde, against all odds, sealed their spot in the round of 32. Re-live that match, plus all the latest and greatest, from another day of compelling World Cup action.

items.title: Spain's listless performance won't cut it against ...
items.summary: Spain were lucky to beat Uruguay and will need to improve drastically if they hope to win the World Cup.
